form.label: Policy Decisions
form.description: Demo-oriented policy, verdict, egress, and block-list visibility from the local Splunk index.

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where ("$decision$"="*" OR decision="$decision$") AND ("$policy_id$"="*" OR policy_id="$policy_id$" OR rule_id="$policy_id$") | stats count as policy_events
`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where decision="block" OR decision="deny" OR like(action, "%block%") OR like(action, "%deny%") | stats count as blocks_and_denies
`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where decision="confirm" OR like(action, "%confirm%") | stats count as confirms
`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | eval policy_or_rule=if(policy_id!="(none)", policy_id, rule_id) | where policy_or_rule!="(none)" | stats dc(policy_or_rule) as policies_firing

`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where ("$decision$"="*" OR decision="$decision$") AND ("$policy_id$"="*" OR policy_id="$policy_id$" OR rule_id="$policy_id$") | timechart span=15m count by decision limit=8 useother=t

`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where ("$decision$"="*" OR decision="$decision$") AND ("$policy_id$"="*" OR policy_id="$policy_id$" OR rule_id="$policy_id$") | timechart span=15m count by severity limit=8 useother=t

`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | eval policy_or_rule=if(policy_id!="(none)", policy_id, rule_id) | where ("$decision$"="*" OR decision="$decision$") AND policy_or_rule!="(none)" | stats count as events values(decision) as decisions values(severity) as severities values(connector) as connectors values(target) as targets by policy_or_rule | sort - events | head 20

`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where decision="block" OR decision="deny" OR like(action, "%block%") OR like(action, "%deny%") | stats count as events values(policy_id) as policies values(connector) as connectors values(severity) as severities by target | sort - events | head 20

`defenseclaw_demo_policy_events` | where ("$decision$"="*" OR decision="$decision$") AND ("$policy_id$"="*" OR policy_id="$policy_id$" OR rule_id="$policy_id$") | table timestamp connector policy_id rule_id decision severity run_id session_id target message | sort - timestamp | head 50
